title: Ranga Ranga Lyrics Ivan Vera Madhiri Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ranga Ranga
Singer(s) : Rita
Lyricist : Mani amudhavan
Movie: Ivan Vera Mathiri (2013)
Music: Sathya.C

Yenda yenda yenda ranga
enga enga pona ranga
tension yeri kathurenda
standu standaa nikkurenda

enga mummy ya avan thitta vachitaan
enga engayo avan sutha vachitaan
kadupu yethi yethi yethi vittutaan

ai ranga, ranga ranga..
hey ranga ranga ranga .
ah ringa ringa ringa ..

Yen nerama, en ketta nerama
pala boys-a pinna sutha vacha saabama
enna mattumaa ekka chakkamaa
ada innum yaara alaya vacha innum paavamaa

venumne enna sutha vachitaanaa
ingathaan engo olinjirukuraana

pillaiyaaru pillaiyaaru - en
kannil kaattu, avan yaaru yaaru
suthi suthiye nadu roatil nikkuren
inga enga thaeda thaeda
kootathoda kulambi nikkuren

Naan veg-u da, non-veg-u illa da
ada naalu ketta varthaiyaala thitta villada
nalla vela da, en mummy veg-u da
illana inneram meenu bajji da

Veyililil naanum kanjen karuvaadaa
un moonjikellaam meenu oru kedaa.

velakku paarka vaangi naayaa
vaasthu paarka vaanginaayaa
vandhadhaala thaan idhu vandhadhaala thaana
vazhkaiyellaam maaripochu
en pozhappu naari pochu da

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ranga Ranga'?

The song 'Ranga Ranga' conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Ivan Vera Madhiri'?

'Ivan Vera Madhiri' revolves around themes of love and friendship, showcasing the ups and downs of relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Rita and composed by Sathya C.

When was 'Ranga Ranga' released?

'Ranga Ranga' was released on November 9, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ranga Ranga', the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the carefree moments of youth and celebration. The song plays a pivotal role in the movie Ivan Vera Madhiri, highlighting the joy and camaraderie among friends. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. Rita's energetic vocals combined with Sathya C's vibrant music create an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ranga Ranga from Ivan Vera Madhiri is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Rita's captivating vocals and Sathya C's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the lively world of this song that celebrates fun and friendship!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, hey, hey, where is the fun? Where is the tension? Standing here, feeling it all.
Our mom scolded him, he went somewhere. He has left us with a stomach ache.
Oh fun, fun, fun... hey fun, fun, fun... ah ring, ring, ring...
My pain, my bad pain, many boys have come and gone. What will happen to me? Who else will come?
What do I need? Is it here? Is it somewhere else?
Little boy, little boy - show me in my eyes, who is he? I am standing here, looking around with my friends.
I am vegetarian, not non-vegetarian. Don't scold me for asking about food. My mom is vegetarian, or else I would have had fish fritters.
In the sunlight, I am looking at the shadows, your eyes are like fish, a little strange.
Looking at the lamp, I see the dog, and if I look at the house, everything has changed. My life has changed, my situation has changed.
